market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Companies spending the most on AI are growing jobs, Ramp study finds
articles.description: A new study from Ramp found companies making the biggest investments in AI are expanding their workforces, with heavy adopters increasing headcount by about 10% and entry-level hiring by 12%, challenging fears that generative AI is already causing widespread job losses.

articles.title: Financial companies join forces for US dollar stablecoin, keeping reserve earnings
articles.description: The project, supported by Visa, Mastercard and many crypto companies, could be in a position to challenge Tether’s USDT and Circle’s USDC, currently the two largest stablecoins by market capitalization.

articles.title: Google introduces a faster, cheaper image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite
articles.description: Google is updating its image generator to make it faster and cheaper, making it a more useful tool for creators looking to make AI content.

articles.title: Nasdaq brings proprietary market data onchain through Pyth
articles.description: The partnership extends distribution of Nasdaq's TotalView market data to blockchain applications and other software platforms through Pyth's marketplace.

articles.title: Google 強化 AI 生成戰力，新版 Nano Banana、Gemini Omni 上線
articles.description: 運用生成式 AI 進行創作，往往可以在創意上反覆嘗試。Google 提供了 Nano Banana、Gemin […]

articles.title: Why OpenUSD's 'real threat' that tanked Circle stock still faces a steep uphill battle for adoption
articles.description: The Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium can challenge Circle's business model, but analysts say building a network is harder than assembling big-name partners.

articles.title: Bitcoin price risks drop below $58K as US dollar hits 40-year high against yen
articles.description: Bitcoin faced downside pressure as the US dollar hit its highest levels against the Japanese yen since 1986, while BTC price analysis revealed "capitulation" by 2025 top-buyers.

articles.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
articles.description: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.

articles.title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
articles.description: Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. The startup's new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.

articles.title: SEC giving novel ETFs a rethink as it opens comment period on overhauling U.S. rules
articles.description: Managers of exchange-traded funds, including those in the crypto sector, may see some changes at the Securities and Exchange Commission as it weighs its approach.

articles.title: AI’s power crunch turns Bitcoin miners’ grid access into an asset
articles.description: Bitcoin miners have the power sites AI companies need, but turning old mining campuses into real data center revenue is no easy pivot.

articles.title: Crypto companies have spent $189M so far on 2026 US election cycle: Report
articles.description: The crypto industry, big tech and gambling interest groups are betting big on politicians in the 2026 primaries and elections, with almost $300 million shelled out  so far.

articles.title: Business use of stablecoins set for growth surge: Cybrid report
articles.description: The majority of businesses surveyed are likely to use stablecoins within the next 12 months, while regulatory clarity remained the biggest barrier to wider adoption.

articles.title: Chinese exile once linked to Trump strategist gets 30-year sentence in $1 billion fraud
articles.description: The businessman known as Miles Guo, who pushed the fraudulent H-Coin project and had close ties to Steve Bannon, was finally sentenced after his 2024 conviction.

articles.title: Blue Origin still doesn’t know why its New Glenn rocket blew up last month
articles.description: But the company is still claiming that New Glenn will return to flight this year.

articles.title: Tesla starts testing Cybercab without pedals or a steering wheel in Austin
articles.description: The company may finally be ready to try to deliver on Elon Musk's years-long promise of launching a robotaxi network of its own.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: X now offers an MCP server to make its platform easier for AI tools to use
articles.description: X has launched a hosted MCP server, making it easier for developers to connect AI applications with the company’s API.

articles.title: Arcturus could halve the grid’s electrical losses using its nano-infused metals
articles.description: Stealthy startup Arcturus uses lasers to infuse carbon nanomaterials into copper, dramatically improving its ability to conduct electricity.

articles.title: Podcasting platform Riverside enters the newsletter publishing game
articles.description: Users will be able use AI to create newsletters based on their recordings.
